title: SpecLynx Completion Item
description: Schema for an autocompletion suggestion provided by the SpecLynx Language Service

label.description: The text shown in the completion list

detail.description: Additional detail shown alongside the completion label (e.g., type information)

documentation.description: Documentation shown in a hover panel when the completion is selected

insertText.description: The actual text inserted when the completion is accepted

filterText.description: Text used for filtering the completion list

sortText.description: Text used for sorting completions in the list

deprecated.description: Whether this completion item is deprecated
